{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = GSS Kholien
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[GSS Kholien]] is a ship commanded by [[Nelthan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[GSS Kholien]] is a ship that hosted a peacekeeping force.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Captain Vallenar, this is Commander Nelthan of GSS Kholien.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
